title: Kausitaki Brahmana: The Path of the Gods
description: Kausitaki Brahmana — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Kausitaki Brahmana — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: After death, the soul of the wise reaches the world of Brahma. He is greeted by Brahma himself: 'Who are you?' The soul says: 'I am you, the eternal Self.' Brahma says: 'Whatever I am, you are. Welcome.'
